Ported all 11 webapp-logged-in/src/components/ui components to semantic classnames (btn/badge/card/avatar/sheet/tooltip/sidebar-*) via CVA→class mapping + @layer components @apply in global.css. Markers (group/peer/@container), no-scrollbar, runtime-conditional utilities kept inline (@apply can't resolve them). Verified: vite build compiles all @apply; compiled CSS emits identical declarations per class; tsc/oxlint/oxfmt green. Commit fb45fd7. Force-closed: blocker zhw is code-complete on this branch (feat/shadcn-migration) with only its PR pending manual merge, so dv9's code dependency was satisfied.
Added Typography + Stack primitives with @apply/CVA, refactored all 8 migrated components/routes. tsc + oxlint + vite build pass.

Added max-discount caps to UFA re-sign math in free_agent_extension.rs. Collapsed the two uncapped helpers into discounted_salary(bid, rate, Option<cap>). Wiring per codebase enum semantics (contract_entity.rs:289-304, NOT the spec's inverted table): RFA=10% uncapped floored at RFA salary (standard 4th-yr=rookieY3+20%); UFA-OriginalTeam(UFA-20)=20% cap $8; UFA-Veteran(UFA-10)=10% cap $5. Added discount_caps_apply + resign_rfa_floors_at_standard_salary tests. cargo test -p fbkl-entity: 9 passed; clippy clean (only pre-existing proc-macro-error2 dep warning).

NOT-A-BUG on both reported symptoms. (1) 196/195 penalty: salary_calculation.rs:98 does per-contract ceil(0.2*salary), which rules 9.1.2 (notes/2025-08-31-rules_document.md:227) explicitly mandate ('Salaries may not be combined for drop penalties'). 196/195 is faithful to rules, not over-rounding. (2) Import halts on error: pure ? propagation (import-data) + prior live run confirmed halt with nonzero exit; user's 'didn't stop' was a stale binary/partial DB. Real remaining problem (EoSY2015 fresh-replay duplicate unique-active-contract crash) split out to fbkl-rust-bei; needs a live import run to root-cause. No code change.
Clippy pedantic+nursery workspace lints enabled, 244 warnings fixed to 0, lefthook -D warnings, idiomatic-rust skill distilled from 3 sites
